columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Event generation time

columns.name: SiteId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the site

columns.name: HostId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the host managing this site

columns.name: SiteName
columns.description: Display name of the site (parsed from meta.name)

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Site description (parsed from meta.desc)

columns.name: GatewayMac
columns.description: MAC address of the gateway/console managing this site (parsed from meta.gatewayMac)

columns.name: Timezone
columns.description: Site timezone (parsed from meta.timezone)

columns.name: TotalDevices
columns.description: Total number of devices at the site

columns.name: OfflineDevices
columns.description: Number of devices currently offline

columns.name: OfflineWifiDevices
columns.description: Number of WiFi devices currently offline

columns.name: OfflineWiredDevices
columns.description: Number of wired devices currently offline

columns.name: OfflineGatewayDevices
columns.description: Number of gateway devices currently offline

columns.name: PendingUpdateDevices
columns.description: Number of devices with pending firmware updates

columns.name: CriticalNotifications
columns.description: Count of critical-severity site notifications

columns.name: WifiClients
columns.description: Number of WiFi clients connected

columns.name: WiredClients
columns.description: Number of wired clients connected

columns.name: GuestClients
columns.description: Number of guest clients connected

columns.name: WanUptimePct
columns.description: WAN uptime percentage (parsed from siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime)

columns.name: WifiTxRetryPct
columns.description: WiFi TX retry percentage (parsed from siteStatistics.percentages.txRetry)

columns.name: IpsMode
columns.description: IPS mode of the gateway (e.g., ips, ids, off)

columns.name: InspectionState
columns.description: Deep packet inspection state (on, off)

columns.name: Meta
columns.description: Raw site metadata (kept for forward-compatibility and ad-hoc access)

columns.name: SiteStatistics
columns.description: Raw site statistics (kept for forward-compatibility and ad-hoc access)

columns.name: Permission
columns.description: API caller's permission level for this site

columns.name: IsOwner
columns.description: Whether the API caller owns this site
